title: If you could have one as a pet
display_title: If you could have one as a pet
wikitext:
[]: If you could have one as a pet..             Quote Post by RandomStuff » Fri Feb 22, 2008 10:40 pm If you could have any Angel or Evangelion Unit as an ever following mini-pet which would you pick? P.S. They have all their powers but to scale of a one-foot version. I'd say Sachi and Sho, cuz I could make them reenact episode 1/2 but if one looked it was gonna die i could just pick them up and put them in little aquarium type things.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Feb 22, 2008 10:46 pm I think there's been a thread for this. Mine would definitely be Sachi though.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Fri Feb 22, 2008 11:28 pm Well if it was obedient and potty trained I would pick Ireul, yes we would have lots of fun controlling the worlds computers!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Feb 22, 2008 11:38 pm Fem-Kaworu.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Feb 22, 2008 11:41 pm Reichu wrote: Fem-Kaworu.

[]:             Quote Post by Grand Duke of Yashima » Sat Feb 23, 2008 12:09 am I'd get a Ramiel and sic it on the neighbor's dogs if they crossed over into my front lawn.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Sat Feb 23, 2008 2:17 am I'll have Zeruel dominate the world!!! Muah ha ha ha ha!

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sat Feb 23, 2008 8:00 am Arael. Even at reduced power level I bet I could still get a peak at people's minds with her.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Sat Feb 23, 2008 10:00 am Ramiel, so he could fly around like Bit from Tron, also, I'd never have to buy a power drill again.

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Sat Feb 23, 2008 3:50 pm Id pick the Please no rebuild spoilers outside of the rebuild subforum

[]:             Quote Post by Barinax » Sat Feb 23, 2008 5:49 pm Kaworu... and perhaps Ramiel. But as a decorative ornament.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Feb 23, 2008 6:55 pm FEM-KAWORU! KIMI NI KIMETA!

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Sat Feb 23, 2008 7:21 pm Eh, Reichey, what would you do with Fem-Kaworu? Make her do your homework or something? Heh heh heh!

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Feb 23, 2008 7:34 pm Reichey would do far more depraved things than that, if she had her own personal fem-Kaworu.

[]:             Quote Post by BeserkerUnit-01 » Sat Feb 23, 2008 8:11 pm Sachiel, duh, hes the coolest. Plus i'd get israfel. I don't see the point, except to creep people out with a pigme guard dog thing.

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Sat Feb 23, 2008 10:25 pm I would have Zeruel help emo kids. Um I actually I would use Zeruel as an escape route if some disaster occurs or if someone tires to mug me.

[]:             Quote Post by RandomStuff » Sat Feb 23, 2008 10:30 pm BrikHaus wrote: Reichey would do far more depraved things than that, if she had her own personal fem-Kaworu.

[]:             Quote Post by Kyle » Sat Feb 23, 2008 11:05 pm Personaly I would like a Rei clone as a pet.A leash would be used but not needed. If I couldn't have that I would have a mini sachiel that I could take to the hospital to cheer up kids with cancer.

[]:             Quote Post by BeserkerUnit-01 » Sun Feb 24, 2008 6:27 am How does Sachiel cheer kids up? He's something that destroys things. What's he going to do, cure their cancer?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Feb 24, 2008 8:23 am BeserkerUnit-01 wrote: He's something that destroys things.
